title: The Minecraft Civilization
description: In this modpack you can build your colony where people will live.
body:
[My discord server](https://discord.gg/7yxJUFVA7v)
# English
## The Minecraft Civilization
In this modpack you can build your colony where people will live. As the mayor of the city, you must build buildings for your colonists. Each resident has his own set of characteristics that affect his profession. You must take care of the food, happiness and safety of your citizens. Periodically, you will be attacked by raiders, who will become arrogant every time.
### The modpack includes mods such as:

[MineColonies](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minecolonies)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/s8AwPZBB4Os" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

[Structurize](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/structurize)
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/363446ab88b4949e31c107e9dd9ff7dc6497d9c2.png)

[Domum Ornamentum](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/domum-ornamentum/files?page=1&pageSize=20)
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1841e0ec3fd39b050716f55b38705086b4d8f43.png)

[Multi-Piston](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/multi-piston/files?page=1&pageSize=20)

[BlockUI](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blockui/files?page=1&pageSize=20)
# Русский
## The Minecraft Civilization
В этом модпаке вы можете построить свою колонию, где будут жить люди. Как мэр города, вы должны строить здания для своих колонистов. У каждого жителя есть свой набор характеристик, влияющих на его профессию. Вы должны заботиться о еде, счастье и безопасности своих граждан. Периодически на вас будут нападать рейдеры, которые с каждым разом будут становиться все более высокомерными.
### Модпак включает в себя такие моды, как:

[MineColonies](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minecolonies)
